qualifications.name: Bachelor of Nursing
notes: Programme code(s): SHBBN.

Faculty career opportunities: Professional Nurse in private and public sector; Midwife; Psychiatric Nurse; Nutritionist; Registered Counsellor; Biokineticist; Certified Leisure Professional; Recreation and Sport Science Specialist.

Additional UNIVEN requirements: NSC 36; Adequate achievement in Life Sciences; Adequate achievement in Mathematics; Adequate achievement in English; Adequate achievement in Physical Sciences; Life Orientation excluded from APS; Selection test required; Physical assessment required.

qualifications.name: BSc in Nutrition
notes: Programme code(s): SHBBSN.

Faculty career opportunities: Professional Nurse in private and public sector; Midwife; Psychiatric Nurse; Nutritionist; Registered Counsellor; Biokineticist; Certified Leisure Professional; Recreation and Sport Science Specialist.

Additional UNIVEN requirements: NSC 34; Adequate achievement in Life Sciences; Adequate achievement in English; Adequate achievement in Mathematics; Adequate achievement in Physical Sciences or Agricultural Sciences.
